completion_summary: Reconciled current classical, constrained, RL, live-LLM, mechanism, and evaluation evidence into the global readiness graph. Added fail-closed architecture issues for unconstrained BO risk regression, SafeGP's incomplete all-task joint rule, and SAC checkpoint instability; recorded that the 100k checkpoint retained 44.37% of the 80k Dev score. The graph remains control-consistent but formal-evidence-incomplete with 11 active issues. Updated the maintainer roadmap without promoting development evidence to benchmark claims. Architecture tests, Ruff, mypy, and JSON validation pass.
notes: Refresh evidence digests; add active probes for risk regression, constrained-method incomplete joint rule, RL checkpoint instability, and missing live model/mechanism adaptation evidence.
scope: Reconcile all current classical, constrained, RL, LLM, mechanism, and evaluation evidence into the global readiness graph and maintainer roadmap without upgrading development evidence to claims
